text:
is a booklet 
enclosed with the Evangelion: 3.33 You Can (Not) Redo home video release. It was released by khara inc. on 24 April 2013. An updated version of the booklet was also released with the 3.333 home video release on 25 August 2021. https://www.evangelion.co.jp/sp/3_0/bd_dvd.html 

Overview

The booklet gives the details of the bonus content of the home video release of Evangelion: 3.33 You Can (Not) Redo. 

Contents

Characters Settei
Mechanics Settei
Evangellion Settei
Angel Settei
Rebuild of EVANGELION: 3.33 Commentary
Teaser, Trailer, TV SPOT, etc
Chapter List
Original Sound Track List
Lyrics
Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo Original Soundtrack Staff
BLU-RAY & DVD STAFF
Package Staff

Staff

References
